keyboardNavigationDelay.description: How long to wait before showing a diff view after navigating to an entry with the keyboard

viewChangesForCurrentFileDiffPaneSplitDi.title: Direction to open diff pane
viewChangesForCurrentFileDiffPaneSplitDi.description: Direction to split the active pane when showing diff associated with open file. If 'none', the results will be shown in the active pane.

gitDiagnostics.description: Write detailed diagnostic information about git operations to the console

filesystemEventDiagnostics.description: Trace observed filesystem events to the console

performanceMask.description: Performance event stream patterns to capture

performanceToConsole.description: Log performance data to the console

performanceToDirectory.description: Log performance data to JSON files in a directory

automaticCommitMessageWrapping.description: Hard wrap commit message body in commit box to 72 characters. Does not apply to expanded commit editors, where message formatting is preserved.

graphicalConflictResolution.description: Resolve merge conflicts with in-editor controls

showDiffIconGutter.description: Show change regions within a file patch with icons in addition to color

excludedUsers.description: Comma-separated list of email addresses to exclude from the co-author selection list

reportCannotLocateWorkspaceError.description: Log an error to the console if a git repository cannot be located for the opened file

remoteFetchProtocol.description: Transport protocol to prefer when creating a new git remote

projectScanDepth.description: Scan subdirectories of project roots for nested git repositories (0 = only root, 1 = one level deep, etc.)

openGitTabOnStart.description: Automatically open the Git tab when the editor starts

debug.description: Log additional debug information to the console, including caught errors and diagnostics

allowDubiousOwnership.title: Allow dubious ownership
allowDubiousOwnership.description: Pass `safe.directory=*` to git to allow operations on repositories where the directory owner does not match the current user (e.g. WSL paths opened from Windows). When disabled, a notification will guide you to resolve the issue manually.

warnLargeRepo.title: Warn if repository is too large
warnLargeRepo.description: Show a warning notification when a repository has too many changed files to display completely.
